title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rifana
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rifana is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant, a flowering legume native to the mountainous regions of North Africa and the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rifana include its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
